summary: The Ress protocol connection divergence is semicolon-only rustfmt noise in existing poll early returns.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 267: M	crates/ress/protocol/src/connection.rs.
The isolated patch only adds semicolons to `Poll::Ready(None)` and node-type-message early returns.
No connection termination, node-type announcement, polling, or encoded message behavior changed.
